StructurePhase.Reference: Kuz`ma Yu.B., Fedorov T.F., Sobolev A.S., Skolozdra R.V., Sov. Phys. Crystallogr. (Engl. Transl.), v11 p697 (1967)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N2O6P21. LPF Collection Code: 1406961. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Nb,Ni,B. Compound Preparation: sintered at 1273 K under argon, then arc-melted under helium. Sample annealed at 1173 K for 500 h in sealed evacuated quartz tube. Article Title: THE CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF Nb2Ni21B6. Minor Warning: No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: h f e c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Okada S., Hamano K., Lundstrom T., Higashi I., AIP Conf. Proc., v231 p456 (1991)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N3O4. LPF Collection Code: 529529. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:B,Nb. Compound Preparation: crystals grown by copper flux method. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Article Title: CRYSTAL GROWTH OF THE NEW COMPOUND Nb2B3, AND THE BORIDES NbB, Nb5B6, Nb3B4, AND NbB2, USING THE COPPER-FLUX METHOD. Wyckoff Sequence: j2 i a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
